{{Quote|CorSec's men and women will not be drafted into Republic service, to die on a distant world outside of Corellia's borders. Nor will armed forces from other worlds be billeted in our homes.|Shyla Merricope to Corellia Sector Newsfeed reporters|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|news/13314_1.html|Corellia Closes Borders}}</ref>}}
'''Shyla Merricope''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Diktat]] who worked with [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] to prevent the coming [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]] from spilling over into the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], in the months leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Shyla Merricope and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Iblis]] withdrew the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in protest of the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]]. Since the Corellians proved to be one of the harshest critics against the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] that the Republic established. After the announcement of Corellia's withdrawal, Shyla stated at a press conference since she couldn't allow other worlds to use their own security units to battle against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. She was later replaced by [[Dupas Thomree]].

{{Char-stub}}
